title: ASAB Air Pump Drain Plunger Toilet Unblocker Plunger Sink Unblocker for Kitchen and Bathroom with 2 Rubber Suction Cup Toilet Plunger Unblocker Heavy Duty Sink Plunger Tool to Clean all Blocked
features: DRAIN PLUNGER - Our toilet plunger utilises high-pressure air to effectively remove stubborn clogs. Just pump the handle of the plunger to accumulate pressure and then release it, sending a powerful air burst that disintegrates blockages and replaces smooth drainage.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - The plunger toilet unblocker is made from durable, flexible, high-quality rubber materials that are non-toxic and odour-free. The drainer features a robust pump and the handle allows you to take full advantage of the compression power of the toilet plunger unblocker with minimal effort.

2 CUPS SUPPLIED - The robust sink plunger comes equipped with a small suction cup for drains in washbasins and bathtubs and a larger suction cup for toilets. Switching between the two is easy, simply unscrew one and screw on the other.

EASY TO USE - Plungers are perfectly suited for unclogging drains throughout the house, including sinks, bathtubs, bidets, toilets, and showers, thanks to their comfortable design. The soft rubber cup of this sink plunger quickly seals and fits easily in most cupboards and under most sinks.

DIMENSIONS - The diameter of the toilet plunger cup is 17cm and the length of the handle is 450cm, perfect for unblocking and cleaning the shower, sinks, drain, toilets etc. You'll no longer need to use contaminating chemicals to unclog the drains.
description: Product Description ASAB Air Pump Drain Plunger Toilet Unblocker Plunger Sink Unblocker for Kitchen and Bathroom with 2 Rubber Suction Cup TOLIET PLUNGER The plunger toilet unblocker features a compression chamber that expels air with significant force, enabling you to quickly clear any type of drain It is made of natural rubber, which is tough and durable. ERGONOMIC HANDLE The adjustable handle of this toilet plunger unblocker heavy-duty allows for easy storage under a sink or vanity, keeping it discreetly out of view. The plunger handle adjusts effortlessly, enabling quick extension for use when necessary. 2 CUPS SUPPLIED The strong toilet unblocker plunger is supplied with both the suction cup for small drains such as washbasins and bathtubs and the large suction cup for the WC. Replacing one with the other is simple, unscrew one and screw the other. EASY STORAGE The Toilet Plunger, with its slim and simple design, is a must-have tool that can be conveniently stored in a cleaning cart, tucked under a sink, or kept in a janitorial closet.
